description.value: Your infusions no longer decay. The magical energy finds the natural resonance of the material and locks into it. You are no longer making temporary enchantments. You are making magic items.

system.benefits:
Once per long rest, you may perform a Master Infusion over 1 hour of uninterrupted work on a single object, weapon, or piece of armor. A Master Infusion is permanent until dispelled. Additionally, your Imbue Item ability gains one additional use per short rest beyond its normal Tier-based allotment. Your Master infusion grants one of the following effects:

  • Any Infusion Formula you know, permanently active. Charge-based formulae (Kinetic Store, Phase Step, Force Lens) refresh at dawn each day
  • A weapon that permanently deals +[[/damage 8 type=elemental]] damage of your chosen type on every hit
  • Armor with permanently +4 DR
  • An object that permanently grants the bearer Fortune on one specific skill of your choice when held.

usage.text: Master Infusion once per long rest, requires 1 hour of uninterrupted work; passive extra Imbue Item use
